# Vendored: caveman

This folder is **not** something I wrote — it is an exact copy of the
[JuliusBrussee/caveman](https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman) project, taken at the moment I used it (commit `0d95a81`).
In Claude Code I install this plugin via the marketplace and actively use it
(caveman mode, hook integration). It was placed here for my own archive/backup.

License: MIT (see `LICENSE`, copyright belongs to Julius Brussee — the original notice is preserved).

For the current/original source, see the repo above; for installation, installing
via the marketplace (`/plugin marketplace add JuliusBrussee/caveman`) is more
correct — this is only a personal archive copy.
